audit.note: follow_up_action( cs_event-control_by_id, method setExpanded ) after the TOOLBAR_PRESSED round-trip

checked.note: verified in a running system - human live check 2026-07-20 following the interaction checklist (all listed checks passed)

deviations.what: the original controller toggles the third panel imperatively (onOverflowToolbarPress -> oPanel.setExpanded(!oPanel.getExpanded())). Reproduced 1:1 since the whitelist extension (2026-07-18, see pr/control-call-whitelist): the TOOLBAR_PRESSED handler inverts a server-side mirror of the state and calls the whitelisted setExpanded on the panel via client->follow_up_action( cs_event-control_by_id ) - the view no longer carries the improvised two-way `expanded` binding, matching the original view.xml exactly.
